title: JewelryProduct
description:
The root OJS v1.0 product record.

Required modules: identity, commerce, media, audit.
Sub-vertical modules activated by product_type discriminator.
Other modules are optional but recommended per data tier.

JSON-LD friendly: when serialized with `@context` reference, this
becomes valid JSON-LD Schema.org Product with ojs: extensions.
$comment: OJS version 1.0.0. License: CC0 1.0 (vocabulary), Apache 2.0 (reference implementation).

AICommerceModule.description:
AI agent ranking metadata.

Designed to be consumed by ChatGPT (ACP), Perplexity, Google AI Mode,
Microsoft Copilot, and MCP-based agents. Provides explicit discovery
hooks the platforms reward (vs. relying on agents to parse free text).

semantic_description.description: Description written FOR AI AGENTS, not humans. Should be dense, factual, attribute-loaded. E.g.: 'Vintage art deco style platinum solitaire engagement ring with old european cut diamond center stone, milgrain detail, suitable for engagement and anniversary.'
semantic_description.title: Semantic Description

query_keywords.description: Phrases real shoppers type ('art deco engagement ring', 'vintage diamond ring under $5000'). Used for query matching.
query_keywords.title: Query Keywords

confidence_scores.description: Per-field confidence metadata for enrichment pipeline review
confidence_scores.title: Confidence Scores

overall_quality_score.description: Aggregate quality score across all fields (0-1)
overall_quality_score.title: Overall Quality Score

last_enriched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last enrichment run
last_enriched_at.title: Last Enriched At

AICommerceModule.title: AICommerceModule

ARMetadata.description:
AR placement and rendering metadata.

Consumed by Camweara, mirrAR, Trillion, Kivisense, Apple Quick Look.
Without this metadata, AR vendors can render the 3D model but cannot
place it correctly on the user's body.

anchor_offset_mm.description: [x, y, z] offset from anchor in mm
anchor_offset_mm.title: Anchor Offset Mm

default_rotation_degrees.description: [x, y, z] Euler rotation in degrees
default_rotation_degrees.title: Default Rotation Degrees

physics_enabled.description: Allow physics simulation (e.g. swinging earrings, pendant sway)
physics_enabled.title: Physics Enabled

ARMetadata.title: ARMetadata

ActivitySafety.description: Activities and exposures the piece can/cannot tolerate.
ActivitySafety.title: ActivitySafety

AggregateRating.description:
Aggregate review summary.

Maps to Schema.org AggregateRating. Required by GMC for review
extensions to display in Shopping. ACP recommends `star_rating` +
`review_count` at product level.
AggregateRating.title: AggregateRating

edition_number.description: This piece's number within edition (e.g. 3 of 50)
edition_number.title: Edition Number

artist_name.description: Artist name if different from brand
artist_name.title: Artist Name

AuditMetadata.description:
Provenance metadata for the OJS record itself.

REQUIRED on every JewelryProduct. Tracks who/when/where the data
came from for compliance and round-trip integrity.

ojs_version.description: SemVer of the OJS spec this record conforms to
ojs_version.title: Ojs Version

source_record_id.description: Source system's native record ID for round-trip
source_record_id.title: Source Record Id

last_validated_by_human.description: When a human last reviewed this record end-to-end
last_validated_by_human.title: Last Validated By Human

AuditMetadata.title: AuditMetadata

Availability.description:
Product availability state. Aligned with Schema.org ItemAvailability
and GMC/ACP availability enums.
Availability.title: Availability

BiocompatibilityStandard.description: Material safety standards for body jewelry.
BiocompatibilityStandard.title: BiocompatibilityStandard

BodyModule.description:
Body jewelry specifications.

Required when product_type='body'. Material disclosure is critical
for first-piercing/healing safety.

suitable_for_initial_piercing.description: Material/design suitable for fresh piercings per APP standards
suitable_for_initial_piercing.title: Suitable For Initial Piercing

biocompatibility_standards.description: Material safety standards this piece meets (multi-valued)
biocompatibility_standards.title: Biocompatibility Standards

bar_length_mm.description: Bar length / post length / ring inner diameter (mm)
bar_length_mm.title: Bar Length Mm

nickel_free_certified.description: EU Nickel Directive 94/27/EC compliant — critical for piercings
nickel_free_certified.title: Nickel Free Certified

autoclave_safe.description: Can be sterilized by steam autoclave
autoclave_safe.title: Autoclave Safe

BodyModule.title: BodyModule

Brand.description:
Brand / manufacturer identity.

Maps to: Schema.org Brand, GMC `brand`, ACP `brand`, Shopify `vendor`.

name.description: Brand name (≤70 chars per ACP and GMC limits)
name.title: Name

legal_name.description: Full legal entity name if different from brand name
legal_name.title: Legal Name

gln.description: GS1 Global Location Number (13 digits) — links to GS1 registry
gln.title: Gln

Brand.title: Brand

CareModule.description: Care, cleaning, storage instructions for the piece.

professional_inspection_recommended_mont.description: Months between recommended professional inspections (e.g. 6 for prong settings)
professional_inspection_recommended_mont.title: Professional Inspection Recommended Months

CareModule.title: CareModule

report_url.description: URL to lab's official report verification page
report_url.title: Report Url

report_pdf_url.description: URL to PDF copy of full report
report_pdf_url.title: Report Pdf Url

refers_to_stone_index.description: Index in stones[] this cert refers to (0=center stone). Omit if for whole piece.
refers_to_stone_index.title: Refers To Stone Index

CertificationModule.description:
All certificates associated with the piece.

Diamonds typically have one cert per stone. Some pieces have a
single piece-level cert. AGS certs are legacy-only (lab closed 2022).
CertificationModule.title: CertificationModule

ChainStyle.description: Chain link topology for necklaces and bracelets.
ChainStyle.title: ChainStyle

ColoredStoneClarityGrade.description:
GIA clarity system for colored stones.

Distinct from the diamond FL-I3 scale. Used for sapphires, rubies,
emeralds, and other colored species per GIA colored stone grading.
ColoredStoneClarityGrade.title: ColoredStoneClarityGrade

CommerceModule.description:
All commercial offers for the piece. REQUIRED.

Most products have one offer (one retailer); marketplace pieces
may have many. Use first offer for short-form syndication.

primary_offer_index.description: Index of canonical offer for short-form syndication
primary_offer_index.title: Primary Offer Index

CommerceModule.title: CommerceModule

Condition.description: Product condition (used by Schema.org, GMC, ACP).
Condition.title: Condition

ConfidenceScore.description:
Confidence metadata for a field value.

Surfaced in the Arbling enrichment pipeline so retailers can see
which fields are reliable vs. need review.

validated_at.description: When a human last confirmed this value
validated_at.title: Validated At

ConfidenceScore.title: ConfidenceScore

ConfidenceSource.description: Where a value came from. Higher confidence sources outrank lower.
ConfidenceSource.title: ConfidenceSource

CutGrade.description: GIA cut grade for round brilliant diamonds. Also polish/symmetry.
CutGrade.title: CutGrade

DesignStyle.description: Design style tags. Multi-valued in StyleModule.
DesignStyle.title: DesignStyle

DiamondColorGrade.description: GIA D-Z color scale + Fancy Color descriptors.
DiamondColorGrade.title: DiamondColorGrade

EarringPostType.description:
Earring finding form factor.

Distinct from JewelryClosure (mechanical fastening mechanism).
A huggie is both a form factor and a closure; a stud can have
push_back or screw_back closure. These are complementary dimensions.
EarringPostType.title: EarringPostType

Era.description:
Historical periods and style aesthetics.

Boundaries are conventional, not absolute. Confidence often <0.80
from CV — recommend human validation.
Era.title: Era

EstateModule.description:
Estate / vintage / antique authentication.

Pieces classified as vintage (20+ years) or antique (100+ years)
need provenance documentation to command premium pricing.

period_verified.description: Period attribution verified by qualified appraiser/specialist
period_verified.title: Period Verified

appraisal_value.description: Formal appraisal value (text to preserve currency notation)
appraisal_value.title: Appraisal Value

EstateModule.title: EstateModule

FluorescenceIntensity.description: GIA fluorescence intensity under longwave UV.
FluorescenceIntensity.title: FluorescenceIntensity

GaugeMeasurement.description:
Body jewelry gauge — wire/bar thickness.

Gauge is INVERSE: lower number = thicker. 20g (0.8mm) is thinnest
common; 00g (~10mm) is thickest standard for stretched piercings.
GaugeMeasurement.title: GaugeMeasurement

GemstoneSpecies.description: Major gemstone species. Use 'other' + free-text for rare types.
GemstoneSpecies.title: GemstoneSpecies

GradingLab.description:
Accredited gemological laboratories.

NOTE: AGS Laboratories closed end-2022 and merged into GIA.
Do not assign new grading to AGS; legacy reports remain valid.
GradingLab.title: GradingLab

HSCodePrefix.description: Common HS 2022 codes for jewelry. Use 6-digit subheadings where known.
HSCodePrefix.title: HSCodePrefix

Hallmark.description: A single hallmark stamped on the piece.

mark_text.description: Text/symbol of the mark (e.g. 'LION PASSANT', '750', 'M' date letter)
mark_text.title: Mark Text

interpretation.description: What it tells us (e.g. 'Sterling silver, London 1925')
interpretation.title: Interpretation

Hallmark.title: Hallmark

IdentityModule.description:
Product identity. REQUIRED on every JewelryProduct.

The minimum viable fields for cross-platform syndication. Every
downstream platform (Schema.org, GMC, ACP, UCP, Shopify, MCP)
requires title + brand + a stable identifier.

sku.description: Stable SKU. Maps to: Schema.org sku, GMC id, ACP item_id, Shopify variant.sku
sku.title: Sku

title.description: Product title (≤150 chars per ACP; ≤150 GMC recommended). Avoid all-caps.
title.title: Title

title_localized.description: Title in additional languages. Use for multi-locale catalogs.

description.description: Plain-text product description (≤5000 chars per ACP)
description.title: Description

gtin.description: GTIN-8/12/13/14. Strongly recommended — major AI ranking signal.
gtin.title: Gtin

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number (≤70 chars per ACP)
mpn.title: Mpn

designer.description: Designer name if distinct from brand (e.g. 'Aldo Cipullo' for Cartier Love)
designer.title: Designer

handle.description: URL-safe slug. Shopify-style handle (lowercase, hyphens). Auto-generated if absent.
handle.title: Handle

product_subtype.description: Fine-grained type within product_type. E.g. product_type='ring' + product_subtype='engagement_ring'. Required for marketplace faceted navigation.

note.description: Factual product callout or disclaimer, distinct from marketing description. E.g. 'All natural stones vary slightly in color', 'Aftermarket product not affiliated with brand X'.
note.title: Note

IdentityModule.title: IdentityModule

is_primary.description: Exactly one image should have this true
is_primary.title: Is Primary

color_variant.description: Variant axis value (e.g. 'rose_gold') if image is variant-specific
color_variant.title: Color Variant

JewelryClosure.description: For necklaces, bracelets, earrings — closure mechanism.
JewelryClosure.title: JewelryClosure

hs_code_full.description: Full HS code (6-10 digits) including country sub-classifications
hs_code_full.title: Hs Code Full

country_of_origin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country of origin (required for cross-border)
country_of_origin.title: Country Of Origin

age_restriction_minimum.description: Minimum age in years (for piercing tools, smart medical wearables)
age_restriction_minimum.title: Age Restriction Minimum

ftc_lab_grown_disclosure.description: Lab-grown disclosed per FTC 16 CFR §23.24 if synthetic stones present
ftc_lab_grown_disclosure.title: Ftc Lab Grown Disclosure

ftc_treatment_disclosure.description: Treatments disclosed per FTC 16 CFR §23.22 if treated stones present
ftc_treatment_disclosure.title: Ftc Treatment Disclosure

cites_permit_number.description: CITES permit number for restricted materials (coral, ivory)
cites_permit_number.title: Cites Permit Number

images.description: At least one image required for syndication
images.title: Images

usdz_url.description: Apple USDZ (preferred for iOS Quick Look)
usdz_url.title: Usdz Url

ar_metadata.description: AR placement metadata for vendor integration

MetalColor.description: Visible metal color. Note: 'rose'/'yellow'/'white' refer to gold variants.
MetalColor.title: MetalColor

MetalComposition.description:
A single metal component of the piece.

For multi-metal pieces (two-tone rings, etc.), include one
MetalComposition per distinct metal. Mark `primary=True` on the
dominant one (used for short-form syndication like Schema.org material).

purity_fineness.description: Parts per 1000 (fineness). Examples: gold 24k=999, 18k=750, 14k=585, 10k=417; silver sterling=925, Britannia=958; platinum=950.
purity_fineness.title: Purity Fineness

purity_karat.description: Karat for gold only (10/14/18/22/24). Auto-derivable from fineness.
purity_karat.title: Purity Karat

plating_thickness_microns.description: Plating thickness in µm (UN/CEFACT code '4H'). Vermeil requires ≥2.5 µm.
plating_thickness_microns.title: Plating Thickness Microns

weight_grams.description: Weight of this metal component in grams
weight_grams.title: Weight Grams

primary.description: Whether this is the primary/dominant metal (one per product)
primary.title: Primary

MetalComposition.title: MetalComposition

MetalType.description:
Base metal types per ISO 9202:2019.

Codes correspond to common jewelry trade conventions. For non-precious
or surgical metals (steel, titanium), use the appropriate enum.
MetalType.title: MetalType

MetalsModule.description:
All metal information for a jewelry piece.

REQUIRED for metal-bearing products. Skip for pure-pearl or pure-gem
items where metal is incidental (e.g. pearl on silk cord).

compositions.description: One per distinct metal. Mark one with primary=True.
compositions.title: Compositions

total_metal_weight_grams.description: Sum of metal weight across all compositions
total_metal_weight_grams.title: Total Metal Weight Grams

nickel_free.description: Compliant with EU Nickel Directive 94/27/EC for prolonged skin contact
nickel_free.title: Nickel Free

hypoallergenic_certified.description: Manufacturer claims hypoallergenic; verify with ASTM F2999 / EN 1811
hypoallergenic_certified.title: Hypoallergenic Certified

conflict_free.description: Compliant with OECD conflict-free sourcing for gold
conflict_free.title: Conflict Free

recycled_content_percent.description: Percent recycled metal content (0-100). Audit chain required for claim.
recycled_content_percent.title: Recycled Content Percent

lead_free.description: All components free of lead. Required claim for Prop 65, EU REACH, and children's jewelry regulations.
lead_free.title: Lead Free

tarnish_resistant.description: Whether the piece is tarnish resistant. Material property of composition/plating, not a care instruction.
tarnish_resistant.title: Tarnish Resistant

MetalsModule.title: MetalsModule

Money.description:
A monetary amount with currency.

`amount` is stored as Decimal-compatible string to avoid float drift.
Always pair with `currency` (ISO 4217). Schema.org maps this to
PriceSpecification; GMC splits into `price` + `currency`.
Money.title: Money

MultilingualString.description:
Text in multiple languages, keyed by ISO 639-1 code.

Use for product titles, descriptions, care instructions, etc.
Always include at least one language; 'en' recommended as fallback.
MultilingualString.title: MultilingualString

Offer.description:
A single commercial offer for the piece.

Maps to Schema.org Offer. Multi-region pricing or multi-channel
offers use multiple Offer entries.

sale_price.description: Sale price if currently on sale

availability_date.description: ISO 8601 date when item becomes available (required if preorder)
availability_date.title: Availability Date

target_countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 countries where offer is valid (ACP required field)
target_countries.title: Target Countries

return_policy_url.description: Return policy URL (ACP required for eligible_checkout)
return_policy_url.title: Return Policy Url

bnpl_available.description: Whether BNPL (Affirm/Klarna/Afterpay) is offered — strong AI ranking signal
bnpl_available.title: Bnpl Available

warranty_years.description: Manufacturer warranty in years. Complements lifetime_warranty (boolean). E.g. 2.0 for a 2-year warranty.
warranty_years.title: Warranty Years

return_policy_days.description: Return window in days. Structured complement to return_policy_url. GMC and AI agents require numeric value for comparison.
return_policy_days.title: Return Policy Days

Offer.title: Offer

PaymentMethod.description: Accepted payment methods. Influences BNPL/financing signals.
PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod

PearlBodyColor.description: Primary body color (hue of the pearl itself).
PearlBodyColor.title: PearlBodyColor

PearlLuster.description: CIBJO/GIA luster grades — how surface reflects light.
PearlLuster.title: PearlLuster

PearlMatchingGrade.description: For strands and multi-pearl pieces — how well pearls match.
PearlMatchingGrade.title: PearlMatchingGrade

PearlOvertone.description: Secondary translucent color overlaid on body color.
PearlOvertone.title: PearlOvertone

PearlType.description: Pearl origin type (most economically important attribute).
PearlType.title: PearlType

PearlsModule.description:
CIBJO 7-factor pearl grading.

Activated when product_type='pearl' or stones contain pearl species.
Many fields have AAA/AA/A market shorthand mapped to the more
descriptive CIBJO enum values above.

size_mm.description: Pearl diameter in mm (use longest axis for non-round)
size_mm.title: Size Mm

pearl_count.description: Number of pearls in the piece (e.g. strand)
pearl_count.title: Pearl Count

PearlsModule.title: PearlsModule

PlacementAnchor.description: Where AR-rendered piece attaches on the body.
PlacementAnchor.title: PlacementAnchor

PlatingType.description: Surface plating applied over a base metal.
PlatingType.title: PlatingType

PriceTier.description: Coarse price tier for AI agent matching ('affordable luxury', 'fine').
PriceTier.title: PriceTier

ProductSubtype.description:
Fine-grained product classification within a product_type.

Enables marketplace faceted navigation (GMC subcategory, Amazon node,
Etsy taxonomy). product_type='ring' + product_subtype='engagement_ring'
is unambiguous; product_type alone is not.
ProductSubtype.title: ProductSubtype

ProductType.description:
Top-level discriminator. Activates sub-vertical modules.

See domain docs for which fields become required per type:
  - pearl → pearls module
  - watch → watch module
  - smart_wearable → smart module
  - body → body module
  - estate → estate module
ProductType.title: ProductType

owner.description: Person, family, institution, or auction house
owner.title: Owner

RelationshipType.description: How two products relate (matches ACP relationship_type enum).
RelationshipType.title: RelationshipType

item_group_id.description: Stable group ID shared by all variants of this product (GMC item_group_id, ACP group_id, Shopify product ID)
item_group_id.title: Item Group Id

variant_axes.description: Up to 3 axes (Shopify cap). For ACP, also fills Custom_variant1-3.
variant_axes.title: Variant Axes

is_master_variant.description: Whether this SKU is the canonical/master variant
is_master_variant.title: Is Master Variant

symbol_name.description: Name of the symbol (e.g. 'Hamsa', 'Khamsa', 'Star of David', 'Crucifix')
symbol_name.title: Symbol Name

ceremony_types.description: Ceremonies/occasions this piece is associated with
ceremony_types.title: Ceremony Types

blessing_authority.description: Who blessed it (priest, rabbi, imam, etc.)
blessing_authority.title: Blessing Authority

Review.description: A single review (optional; mostly used for syndication).
Review.title: Review

reviews.description: Optional individual reviews (cap at 20 for feed size)
reviews.title: Reviews

qa_questions.description: Customer questions (for q_and_a feed in ACP)
qa_questions.title: Qa Questions

qa_answers.description: Corresponding answers — same index as qa_questions
qa_answers.title: Qa Answers

RingSize.description:
A ring size measurement in multiple equivalent systems.

ISO inner circumference is canonical; other systems derived.
Example: US 7 ≈ ISO 54 ≈ UK N ≈ EU 54.
RingSize.title: RingSize

SettingMaterial.description: Material the setting is made of.
SettingMaterial.title: SettingMaterial

SettingModule.description: All settings used in the piece. Most rings have 1; eternity bands many.

primary_style_id.description: ID of the main/center setting if multiple styles present
primary_style_id.title: Primary Style Id

SettingModule.title: SettingModule

SettingStyle.description: A single setting style applied to one or more stones.

style_id.description: Local ID used by Stones.setting_style_id to reference this setting
style_id.title: Style Id

prong_count.description: Number of prongs (only for prong/half-bezel settings)
prong_count.title: Prong Count

head_height_mm.description: Vertical projection of setting above band (mm)
head_height_mm.title: Head Height Mm

gallery_present.description: Whether decorative gallery (under-setting filigree) is present
gallery_present.title: Gallery Present

SettingStyle.title: SettingStyle

SettingType.description: How stone(s) are mounted to the metal.
SettingType.title: SettingType

SizingModule.description: Physical dimensions of the piece. Fields used depend on product_type.

ring_resizable.description: Whether ring can be resized professionally
ring_resizable.title: Ring Resizable

ring_thickness_mm.description: Band profile height in mm (side view). Distinct from ring_width_mm (top view across finger). Relevant for comfort fit bands.
ring_thickness_mm.title: Ring Thickness Mm

pendant_thickness_mm.description: Pendant depth/thickness in mm. Third dimension alongside pendant_width_mm and pendant_height_mm.
pendant_thickness_mm.title: Pendant Thickness Mm

earring_post_type.description: Earring finding form factor (how the earring looks/sits on the ear). Complements closure (mechanical fastening mechanism).

total_weight_grams.description: Total weight of the finished piece (g)
total_weight_grams.title: Total Weight Grams

SizingModule.title: SizingModule

SmartModule.description:
Smart device specifications.

Required when product_type='smart_wearable'. For Apple Watch /
Galaxy Watch, also populate WatchModule.

battery_life_days.description: Battery life in days (preferred for smart rings)
battery_life_days.title: Battery Life Days

fda_cleared.description: Has FDA clearance for medical claims
fda_cleared.title: Fda Cleared

subscription_required.description: Premium subscription required for full features (e.g. Oura ring)
subscription_required.title: Subscription Required

weight_grams.description: Device weight in grams (important for smart rings)
weight_grams.title: Weight Grams

SmartModule.title: SmartModule

SourceSystem.description: Where the OJS record was created or last updated.
SourceSystem.title: SourceSystem

Stone.description: A single stone in the piece. Multi-stone pieces use one Stone each.

origin_country.description: Geographic origin (e.g. 'Burma' for ruby, 'Colombia' for emerald)
origin_country.title: Origin Country

carat.description: Weight in carats (1 ct = 200 mg, UN/CEFACT 'CTM')
carat.title: Carat

colored_stone_clarity.description: GIA clarity grade for colored stones. Use instead of clarity_grade for non-diamond species (sapphire, ruby, emerald, etc.).

treatments.description: Enhancements applied. Empty list means untreated/none disclosed.
treatments.title: Treatments

count.description: Number of stones of this type in the piece. Default 1. Use for pavé/accent groups: count=24, total_carat=0.48.
count.title: Count

total_carat.description: Total carat weight for this stone group when count > 1. Distinct from StonesModule.total_carat_weight (sum of all groups).
total_carat.title: Total Carat

setting_style_id.description: Cross-ref to SettingModule for this stone
setting_style_id.title: Setting Style Id

Stone.title: Stone

StoneCut.description: Common faceting shapes. Used for diamond 4Cs and colored stones.
StoneCut.title: StoneCut

StonesModule.description: All stones in the piece. Order matters: index 0 = center/primary stone.

total_carat_weight.description: Sum of carat across all stones (TCW)
total_carat_weight.title: Total Carat Weight

StonesModule.title: StonesModule

StyleModule.description:
Aesthetic and design tags. Multi-valued by design — pieces can
have multiple styles and motifs.

aesthetic_tags.description: Free-text aesthetic descriptors for AI search (e.g. 'cottagecore', 'old-money')
aesthetic_tags.title: Aesthetic Tags

occasions.description: Occasions this piece suits (e.g. engagement, anniversary, birthday). Complements ai_commerce.occasion_tags — use here for non-AI syndication.
occasions.title: Occasions

engravable.description: Whether the piece can be engraved/personalized with text.
engravable.title: Engravable

customizable.description: Whether buyer can make bespoke choices (stone, metal, etc.) beyond pre-made variants.
customizable.title: Customizable

birthstone_month.description: If marketed as a birthstone piece, the month (1=January, 12=December). Not reliably derivable from stone species alone.
birthstone_month.title: Birthstone Month

chain_style.description: Chain link topology for necklaces and bracelets.

color_story.description: Dominant visual colors of the piece. E.g. ['blue', 'white']. Enables color-based AI search ('show me something blue').
color_story.title: Color Story

StyleModule.title: StyleModule

SustainabilityModule.description:
Sustainability and ethical sourcing claims.

Audit chain required for every claim. Unsubstantiated claims may
trigger greenwashing regulatory action (EU Green Claims Directive,
FTC Green Guides 16 CFR Part 260).

is_conflict_free.description: Compliant with conflict-free sourcing (OECD due diligence)
is_conflict_free.title: Is Conflict Free

is_lab_grown_marketed.description: Marketed as lab-grown alternative to mined (FTC disclosure rule applies)
is_lab_grown_marketed.title: Is Lab Grown Marketed

sustainability_story.description: Free-text sustainability story for AI agent narrative use
sustainability_story.title: Sustainability Story

SustainabilityModule.title: SustainabilityModule

TreatmentType.description: Stone enhancement treatments. FTC requires disclosure (16 CFR §23.22).
TreatmentType.title: TreatmentType

VariantAxis.description:
A dimension of variation (e.g. 'metal_color', 'ring_size', 'stone_size').

Used to group SKUs into a coherent product family. Shopify exposes
these as Option 1/2/3 (max 3 axes, 2048 variants total).

value.description: This SKU's value on this axis (e.g. 'yellow_gold', '7', '1.5ct')
value.title: Value

VariantAxis.title: VariantAxis

url.description: HTTPS URL (YouTube/Vimeo embed or hosted MP4)
url.title: Url

case_material.description: Case material (stainless steel, gold, titanium, ceramic)
case_material.title: Case Material

box_papers_included.description: Original box and papers included (collector signal)
box_papers_included.title: Box Papers Included

serviced_date.description: Last service date (ISO 8601) for pre-owned watches
serviced_date.title: Serviced Date

WaterProofRating.description: IP / ATM ingress protection ratings for electronics.
WaterProofRating.title: WaterProofRating

iso_6425_divers.description: ISO 6425 divers' watch certified (≥100m + safety features)
iso_6425_divers.title: Iso 6425 Divers

product_type.description: Top-level product type. Activates sub-vertical modules.

metals.description: Metal composition. Required for metal-bearing products.

setting.description: How stones are set (skip if no stones)
